fixes_detail.description: Marked 4 inverted meta_learning ideas as INVALIDATED: idea_2238f358 (evening boost), idea_07f475b8 (night boost), idea_623426ad (night boost duplicate), idea_920b3e13 (afternoon boost). All 4 proposed 1.08x boost for sessions with 33% WR — directionally inverted.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: Prevents 4 bad ideas from entering auto-apply pipeline. If applied, each would have INCREASED trading frequency during worst-performing sessions.

fixes_detail.description: Applied BTC/ETH LONG + TRENDING regime 3h patience rule to EXIT_AGENT_PROMPT in bot/llm/agents/prompts.py. Prevents premature tighten_sl/full_close in first 3h for BTC/ETH longs in trending regime. Evidence: ETH+TRENDING=58% true-miss rate (n=19, +$1.41/trade), BTC+TRENDING=81% true-miss rate (n=16, +$1.18/trade). Combined: +$2.59/trade EV.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: +$2.59/trade on ETH/BTC LONG trades in trending regime. ~$40-55/year at ~3-4 signals/week.

fixes_detail.description: Pruned insights.json from 108 to 19 entries. Removed 89 duplicate size-edge and time-pattern entries that were inflating confidence via repetition. Accumulator appended new entries without checking for near-identical existing ones.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: Stops artificial confidence inflation from duplicate entries. Future idea generation will be based on non-inflated evidence counts.
